title: Tahini Bliss Cookies
description: A classic dessert with a twist of tahini, perfect for those who love nutty flavors. These chewy cookies are sure to satisfy your sweet tooth.

ingredients.name: Tahini
ingredients.notes: Chosen for its rich nutty flavor

ingredients.name: Baking Soda
ingredients.notes: Ensures our cookies spread and rise

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Whisk together flour, baking soda, and smoked paprika in a medium bowl.
In a large bowl, cream tahini and bliss until smooth.
Add sugars and mix until combined.
Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
Gradually mix in the dry ingredients until just combined.
Scoop tablespoon-sized balls of dough onto the prepared baking sheet, leaving 2 inches of space between each cookie.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
